title: <div>To provide an exhaustive and extensive list of the services your digital ma
content:
To provide an exhaustive and extensive list of the services your digital marketing agency could offer, based on the initial idea of web development, SEO, content development and management, and social media management, here's a detailed breakdown:

### Core Services

1. **Web Development**:
- Custom website design and development
- E-commerce website development
- Mobile-responsive website design
- CMS-based websites (WordPress, Joomla, Drupal, etc.)
- Landing page design and optimization
- Website maintenance and updates

2. **Search Engine Optimization (SEO)**:
- On-page SEO (keyword research, meta tags, content optimization)
- Off-page SEO (link building, guest posting)
- Technical SEO (site speed optimization, mobile optimization, structured data)
- Local SEO (Google My Business optimization, local citations)
- E-commerce SEO
- SEO audit and strategy development

3. **Content Development and Management**:
